first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10), and the mean score delta across all runs (-0.2) is well within the typical noise band. The core reasoning for the low score is consistent across both evaluations, focusing on the same specific, job-relevant skill gaps: insufficient C++ experience, lack of required database skills, and no capital markets domain knowledge. The minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and justification are characteristic of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in location from Germany to Brazil.
